description: Golden evaluation set for the AI Customer Ops Platform RAG pipeline. Each case has a question, the doc_key(s) that SHOULD ground the answer (expected_doc_keys), an optional expected_version (to verify active-version retrieval / supersede correctness), and optional answer_must_include substrings for a lightweight answer-correctness check. Out-of-scope cases have empty expected_doc_keys and assert the system refuses to hallucinate.
notes: doc_keys reference the fictional 'Nexus CRM' sample/demo knowledge base used for this portfolio project (public, made-up content - no real or customer data). Matching is case-insensitive and substring-based. Edit expected_doc_keys to match your own knowledge_documents.doc_key values. The pricing cases set expected_version=2 to verify the supersede/active-version filter (the harness fails if a superseded v1 chunk is ever retrieved).

cases.question: How much does the Starter plan cost per month?
What is the price of the Growth tier?
Is there a free trial and how long is it?
Can I get a refund after I cancel my subscription?
How do I cancel my subscription?
How do I export my data?
What user roles are available in the product?
What is the procedure for handling a billing complaint?
When should a billing issue be escalated?
How are account credits issued for billing problems?
What is the weather like in Tokyo today?
Who won the last World Cup final?
